{"parts":[{"content":"V is clarifying several things:

1. He wants programs that accommodate founders still employed or winding down — so part-time compatible or at least flexible on the "full-time" expectation

2. He's narrowing his focus area: **human cognition, AI, cognitive amplification, human amplification through technology**

3. He wants me to look more broadly, including:
   - Specialized masters programs
   - Niche options in the human cognition / AI / cognitive amplification space

4. He's signaling that this is related to his personal journey and what he wants to work on next

Let me search more broadly for:
- Programs focused on human-computer interaction, cognitive science, AI
- Human augmentation / cognitive amplification focused programs
- Masters programs in relevant areas (HCI, cognitive science + AI, neurotech)
- Fellowships or residencies in this specific domain
- Research programs at the intersection of cognition and AI

I should also check which of the programs I already found are flexible on employment status.","id":null,"signature":"","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_details":null,"part_kind":"thinking"},{"content":"Good clarification.
